description: Capability classes — the bounded, scale-invariant set of NEED KINDS the router classifies a query into BEFORE picking an agent. This set does NOT grow with the agent count: 5 agents or 500, a query is still one of these kinds. Each agent declares which kind(s) it serves via `capabilities` on its card; the router admits only agents whose capabilities include the classified kind. `principle` is a semantic definition (NOT a keyword list, §2.1); `anchors` are embedded EXEMPLAR utterances (used for cosine similarity, never string-matched) that form the kind's classifier centroid. `priority` ONLY fires on a genuine tie (the classifier cannot separate the kinds) and is DEFINED by RECOVERABILITY-OF-MIS-DEFAULT: when forced to guess, default to the kind where being wrong is most gracefully recoverable. Answer/read kinds rank ABOVE obtain/write kinds — knowledge highest (a wrong KB default says 'no match — want to raise a request?', recoverable and useful); record_action lowest (never default an ambiguous query to a WRITE/mutation). At scale these hand-set ranks are replaced by LEARNED win-rates from production outcomes (plan P5).

capabilities.principle: the user wants the facts, status, fields, or timeline of ONE specific record they have identified (by id or active focus)
anchors: summarize incident INC0001234
what is the status of this request
who is this ticket assigned to
give me the details of this record
when was this incident opened

capabilities.principle: the user wants to OBTAIN, order, provision, request, or get access to something new
anchors: I need a new laptop
request access to the finance drive
can I order a second monitor
provision a vpn account for me
please set up a mailbox for a new joiner

capabilities.principle: the user wants an ANSWER, how-to, explanation, or fix — including a bare problem or symptom stated with no other ask; the safe default when intent is unclear
anchors: how do I reset my password
my printer is not working how do I fix it
what is the procedure for requesting time off
steps to configure outlook on a new phone
wifi keeps disconnecting
database is running slow
vpn error 809

capabilities.principle: the user wants to triage, classify, prioritise, assign, or otherwise MODIFY a record
anchors: triage this incident
reassign the ticket to another team
set this ticket priority to high
classify and route this case

capabilities.principle: the user explicitly wants a SET of existing records handed back that resemble a described problem or a named record — the records themselves are the deliverable, not an answer or a fix
anchors: find tickets similar to this incident
have we seen this problem before
show me past cases like this one
are there duplicate tickets for this
other incidents matching this error
find other tickets about vpn drops
